source: Seed data — replaced with live Google reviews by the reviews-sync Cloud Run job (cloud/reviews-sync)

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Cracked my Galaxy S23 screen on a Friday and walked out with it fixed in about an hour — and it cost me $90 less than the quote I got at the mall. No surprises.

reviews.author: Dev P.
reviews.text: Booked through WhatsApp in two minutes, dropped my iPhone 13 Pro off, and the price was exactly what the site said. Honest pricing is rarer than it should be.

reviews.author: Amrit K.
reviews.text: My Pixel 7 charge port was failing and another shop wanted to "send it away." Nuera fixed it the same afternoon and showed me the part first. Will be back.

reviews.author: Jordan L.
reviews.text: Great work on my iPad screen and a fair price. Took a touch longer than the iPhones but they kept me posted on WhatsApp the whole time.

reviews.author: Maria O.
reviews.text: Shattered the back glass on my S22 Ultra. They had the colour I needed in stock and matched it perfectly. Looks brand new for way less than I expected.

reviews.author: Thanh N.
reviews.text: Friendly, fast and local. Compared their iPhone 12 screen price to other shops right on the site before I even messaged — saved over $100. Easy recommend.
